name: demon-bot
description: Discord quote bot with fake quotes, image overlay, auto reactions, metadata, and hyperlink buttons

scripts.deploy: powershell -Command "if ((git diff --cached --quiet) -eq $false) { Write-Host 'No changes to commit' } else { git commit -m \"Update bot features - $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')\"; git push origin main }"
